# Contributing guidelines

Guys, just keep it clean, please understand what you are commiting to the point where you can explain to another person in plain english what your code does without having to go to chat gpt.

Use comments where necessary, name everything with throught (e.g. for commits not "random stuff" but "window behaiviour change for mangowm". Same goes for variables, files, dirs etc.)

If you have an argument keep it professional, no swears, stick to problem that you are trying to resolve and not the person that you are arguing with.
